title: (Bullish Signal) FRHC, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 26, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that FRHC's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 288 similar cases, 245 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 85%. Current price $50.92 crossed the resistance line at $50.94 and is trading between $50.94 resistance and $30.02 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 12/22/20 - 01/26/21, the price experienced a +0.74% Uptrend, while the week of 01/19/21 - 01/26/21 shows a -3% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/o5rk8zmcaxd61.png?width=1452&format=png&auto=webp&s=dfa4e44fa322610506643d53b014f44ce3672aaa

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on January 19, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on FRHC as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 44 of 53 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

Following a +6.93% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FRHC advanced for three days, in 208 of 259 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 245 of 288 cases where FRHC Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 85%

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8949905-freedom-holding-s-frhc-50-34-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-26-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=blog)
